items.line_en: Hey, since I need five chips and no one cook and one chocolate, can I give me?

coach.say: Hey, since I need five chips and no one cook and one chocolate, can I give me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / since I need five chips and no one cook and one chocolate, / can I give me?

items.line_en: Yeah, of course, ma'am, you can get this, hey, I'll get some Coke chips and chocolate for ma'am.

coach.say: Yeah, of course, ma'am, you can get this, hey, I'll get some Coke chips and chocolate for ma'am.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yeah, of course, / ma'am, you can get this, hey, I'll get some Coke chips and chocolate for ma'am.

items.line_en: Ma'am, you have to wait sometimes for your order.

coach.say: Ma'am, you have to wait sometimes for your order.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ma'am, / you have to wait sometimes for your order.

items.line_en: I'll wait for five or six minutes.

coach.say: I'll wait for five or six minutes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll wait for five or / six minutes.

items.line_en: Oh, here is your order ma'am.

coach.say: Oh, here is your order ma'am.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / here is your order ma'am.

items.line_en: Oh, yeah, okay, what's the total veil? Can I please tell ma'am?

coach.say: Oh, yeah, okay, what's the total veil? Can I please tell ma'am?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, yeah, / okay, what's the total veil? Can I please tell ma'am?

items.line_en: Yeah, okay, ma'am, your total veil is 72.

coach.say: Yeah, okay, ma'am, your total veil is 72.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yeah, / okay, / ma'am, / your total veil is 72.

items.line_en: Oh, my God, I really don't know.

coach.say: Oh, my God, I really don't know.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / my God, / I really don't know.
Chunk it: What does 72 come in?

items.line_en: Oh, I think I have to order something.

coach.say: Oh, I think I have to order something.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / I think I have to order something.
Chunk it: Okay, / let me order.

items.line_en: Hey, this is gonna give me two cook.

coach.say: Hey, this is gonna give me two cook.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / this is gonna give me two cook.
Chunk it: Yeah, / of course, / ma'am.

items.line_en: Hey, got two cook for ma'am.

coach.say: Hey, got two cook for ma'am.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / got two cook for ma'am.

items.line_en: Now you can tell me the total veil.

coach.say: Now you can tell me the total veil.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now you can tell me the total veil.
Chunk it: I'm not that much, / only 100.
